## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Config used (redact secrets!) …
2. Command run (e.g. `avatar run -c config.yaml`) …
3. See error …

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include logs or tracebacks if available
(**redact any secrets** — keys, tokens, app passwords).
